message:
Clean up test suite output - suppress console noise

Added console suppression utility:
- test/test-utils.ts: Added suppressConsole() function
- Suppresses console.log, console.error, console.warn during tests
- Returns restore function to re-enable after tests

Applied suppression to noisy tests:
- test/db.test.ts: Suppress migration messages
- test/verify.test.ts: Suppress verification/repair output
- test/test-indexer.ts: Suppress indexing progress messages

Result:
✅ 45 tests passing
✅ Zero stdout noise during test runs
✅ Clean, readable test output

Test output is now pristine - only test results visible
